title: cissus campestris
intro: Cissus campestris, also known as the desert grape or rock vine, is a plant species belonging to the Vitaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cissus campestris include its ability to promote bone health, reduce joint pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often consumed in Africa and Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal and nutritional properties.
